svg.title: Three pillars of SOC in the Abelian Sandpile Model
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing how Noise, Connectivity, and Avalanche combine in the ASM to produce self-organized criticality.

g.text: Abelian Sandpile Model — complexity science framework

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does stochastic noise drive the sandpile to criticality?')
sendPrompt('How does the von Neumann connectivity affect the power law exponent?')
sendPrompt('What is an avalanche in the sandpile model and how is its size measured?')
sendPrompt('What are the key signatures of self-organized criticality in the sandpile simulation?')
sendPrompt('What does scale invariance mean in the context of the sandpile model?')
sendPrompt('How do long-range spatial correlations emerge from local interactions in the sandpile?')
sendPrompt('What makes the sandpile model a genuine example of self-organized criticality?')
